aka: Watch the Fire or Burn Inside It

director.name: 卡罗利娜·波吉 Caroline Poggi
约纳坦·维奈勒 Jonathan Vinel

this_title: Il faut regarder le feu ou brûler dedans
trans_title: Watch the Fire or Burn Inside It
introduction: As water-bombers fight wildfires scorching the island of Corsica, a young woman learns to embrace the flames in an act of resistance. Part mordant karaoke video, part eco-terrorist manifesto, Watch the Fire or Burn Inside It is a work of noise, pyromania, and rage against a world of concrete.
foreign_title: Il faut regarder le feu ou brûler dedans
